creator: toxic@doobie.com
text:
nzbget 0.5.1 was released as nzbget-stable on the 21st of September, 2008.  

For this port, the upstream source was modified to remove Linux-specific code that is used to produce core dump files (introduced in nzbget 0.5.0).  The DumpCore nzbget.conf option was removed, and the appropriate notes were made in the Changelog and example configuration files.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
